result.markdown: --- title: "Week 7: ARIMA models" --- ::: {.cell} ::: ## What you will learn this week * Stationarity and differencing * Random Walk Models ## Pre-seminar activities Read [Sections 9.1-9.2 of the textbook](https://otexts.com/fpp3/arima.html) and watch all embedded videos. ## Tutorial exercises - Complete Exercise 2-5 from [Section 9.11 of the book](https://otexts.com/fpp3/arima-exercises.html) - [Tutorial learning objectives](tute-lo.qmd). ## Assignments * [IA3](../assignments/A3.qmd) is due on Friday 24 April. * [GA3](../assignments/G3.qmd) is due on Tuesday 05 May. ## Weekly quiz * [Week 7 quiz](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=3868) is due on Wednesday 22 April.
